name: Sweet Tater Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. Scald the evaporated milk.
2. Mix the scalded milk with mashed cooked sweet taters, sugar, eggs, lemon extract, cinnamon, and salt until well combined.
3. Pour the mixture into the unbaked pie shell.
4. Bake at 425°F (220°C) for 20 minutes.
5. Reduce the temperature to 350°F (175°C) and continue baking for another 20 or so minutes, or until the crust is golden brown.
6. Allow the pie to cool before serving. Enjoy it warm.
